title: angelica lignescens
intro: Angelica lignescens, also known as dong quai, is a perennial plant native to Asia and is a member of the carrot family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of dong quai include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other issues related to hormonal imbalances, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dong quai can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
